title: Knowledge Assistant is now available by default for Enhanced Security and Compliance customers
body:
Knowledge Assistant is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled and HIPAA controls selected.

Use Knowledge Assistant to create a chatbot that can answer questions about your documents and provide high-quality responses with citations.

See [Use Knowledge Assistant to create a high-quality chatbot over your documents](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/knowledge-assistant).

ref_links.text: Use Knowledge Assistant to create a high-quality chatbot over your documents
